name: accessibility-ai-mcp
description: Accessibility Ai MCP server. Tools: check color contrast, suggest alt text, check heading hierarchy. Built by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: check_color_contrast
tools.description: Check WCAG 2.1 color contrast ratio between foreground and background colors.

tools.name: suggest_alt_text
tools.description: Suggest alt text guidelines and templates for different image types.

tools.name: check_heading_hierarchy
tools.description: Check heading hierarchy in HTML for proper nesting (h1 -> h2 -> h3...).

tools.name: aria_validator
tools.description: Validate ARIA attributes and roles in HTML for correctness.
